steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage uses “However” to introduce a contrast: while Joplin is celebrated for his famous hits, listeners who overlook his lesser-known works miss his full range. The closing statement that these works “deserve as much fame” reinforces an argumentative purpose.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: Choice B — To argue that more attention should be given to Joplin's lesser-known works articulates the core argument: lesser-known works deserve more recognition. Choices A, C, and D either focus on a supporting detail (genre mixing), broaden to multiple composers, or reference content absent from the text. That matches Choice B — To argue that more attention should be given to Joplin's lesser-known works.
